calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Karine Cargo appeared for petitioner Anne Murphy, who was also present with Matthew John McGaughey via Zoom.

The matter came on for hearing on a petition to establish fact of marriage.

The Court stated it had reviewed the filings and everything appeared to be in order. The Court granted the petition, subject to review of the order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
